command:
find backend-hormonia/tests -path '*upload*' -type f -maxdepth 6 | sort && printf '\n--- route refs ---\n' && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for p in Path('backend-hormonia/app').rglob('*.py'):
    s=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if '/download' in s or 'download_url' in s:
        print(p)
PY

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
needle='api/v2/upload'
for p in Path('backend-hormonia/tests').rglob('*.py'):
    s=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if needle in s or '/upload/' in s or 'Upload' in s:
        print(p)
PY
